name: Shrimp Creole (Microwave)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chopped green pepper, celery, minced garlic, butter or margarine, whole tomatoes, tomato paste, parsley flakes, salt, and red pepper in a 2-quart casserole dish. Cover with plastic wrap, leaving one corner uncovered to allow steam to escape.
2. Microwave on High for 3 minutes. Drain the tomatoes and set aside about half to two-thirds of the juice. Chop the remaining tomatoes and add them to the juice, along with the tomato paste and the rest of the ingredients (parsley flakes, salt, and red pepper).
3. Cover and microwave at Medium-High for 10 to 12 minutes or until the shrimp are cooked through, stirring after 5 minutes.
4. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving over hot rice.
